Deconstruct.title: Deconstruct
Deconstruct.description: Assign any buildings or debris to be deconstructed.

DoMining.title: Mine.
DoMining.description: Designate asteroids to be mined for their resources.

DoHarvest.title: Harvest.
DoHarvest.description: Set plants to be harvested for their resources.

DoHunting.title: Hunt.
DoHunting.description: Animals will be marked as game that can be hunted for their resources.
